problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Aerogel. Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
